title: achillea millefolium var. californica
intro: Achillea millefolium var. californica, commonly known as the California Yarrow, is a variety of the Yarrow plant, a flowering perennial native to the western United States and Canada. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to reduce swelling, fight infection, and promote healing. The health benefits of California Yarrow include reducing menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, as well as alleviating digestive issues and supporting the immune system. California Yarrow can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, or as a topical treatment for skin irritations and wounds.
